new_introductions: White cylindrical object (likely a nutrient or moisture probe) adjacent to P2

plant_audit.P1: No visible foliage. Pot appears empty.
plant_audit.P2: Contains soil and a moisture sensor. No visible plant matter.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos specimen present, though severely diminished. White rabbit anchor remains.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: White granular material (likely perlite or mineral deposits) visible on the surface of P3.

temporal_deltas.T_minus_5_to_T_minus_2: Introduction of technical hardware (sensors) into the biome.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_1: Significant drop in ambient light, obscuring detail.
temporal_deltas.Current: Return of visibility confirms lack of vegetative growth in P1, P2, and P4.

anomalies: Presence of electronic sensors in P2
Absence of expected foliage in P1 and P4
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome has undergone a transition from a botanical collection to a technical testing environment. P1 and P4 are effectively empty, showing no signs of life. P2 has been repurposed to house a soil moisture sensor. P3 remains the only pot with a living occupant, though it is in a state of severe stagnation. The lack of direct light and the focus on sensor integration suggest the biome is currently being used for hardware calibration rather than plant cultivation.
